_publications._publicationTitle: Multiplatform molecular profiling uncovers two subgroups of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors with distinct therapeutic vulnerabilities.

_contextSnippet: Capillary-based immunoassay (WES) confirming knockout of PTCH1 and subsequent increased GLI1 activity in HSC1-λ cells
details: Successfully confirmed knockout of PTCH1 in HSC1-λ cells using capillary-based immunoassay
